text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross hasn't turned up for training yet.
Just as I wonder whether she's going to show up
at all...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I figured I should get some grub in before
exercisin', but I accidentally got too much.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My stomach was burstin' by the time I was halfway
done, but there's no way I was gonna leave good
food uneaten.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I got all of it down, but it took me a
while... I'm really sorry, so I hope ya aren't too
miffed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know how difficult Tamamo Cross finds it to eat
large portions of food, and she seems genuinely
sorry, so I let her off the hook with a light
warning.
